question: From the Chicago Public Library locations that are top five in YTD computer sessions in each year spanning two years before the year (within 2017-2022) with the highest total Charter flight passengers over Los Angeles international airports through that year, which location had the fewest YTD visitors in the last year of that span? Return the branch name only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
